cognito.userpoolriskconfigurationattachm.Docs: The event action.  +  `BLOCK` Choosing this action will block the request.+  `MFA_IF_CONFIGURED` Present an MFA challenge if user has configured it, else allow the request.+  `MFA_REQUIRED` Present an MFA challenge if user has configured it, else block the request.+  `NO_ACTION` Allow the user to sign in.
Flag specifying whether to send a notification.
